goal: Tighten the remaining M6 real-adapter CUDA path by making the CUDA training preflight verify that any digest-pinned MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST image is not merely inspectable but also looks like a CUDA plus Python runtime base image. This prevents ordinary application images from satisfying the Docker base image prerequisite. The gate must not claim M6-RC or v0 release GO; release readiness remains NOT_GO until a real trained adapter and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence exist.
head: fa17a6b
blocked_scope: Changing generated training or Docker handoff commands
Pulling Docker images or downloading dependencies as part of the committed phase
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
Changing runtime templates, Dockerfiles, specs, or release acceptance policy
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA training preflight to validate the digest-pinned Docker base image runtime markers, update focused preflight tests, regenerate the current local preflight/readiness artifacts, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Preflight rejects digest-pinned inspectable non-CUDA application images with docker_base_image_cuda_python_runtime
Preflight requires CUDA markers and Python runtime markers when MIB_DOCKER_BASE_IMAGE_WITH_DIGEST is set and inspect succeeds
Current local preflight remains NOT_READY_CUDA_LORA_TRAINING because the env var is absent and host CUDA is unavailable
Current v0 readiness remains NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real CUDA training and no-fake Docker endpoint evidence are collected.
This gate does not pull Docker images, run CUDA training, or create model weights/adapters.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped runtime-marker preflight gate so digest-pinned Docker base image evidence cannot be satisfied by ordinary application images.
phase_notes.audit: Confirmed current preflight accepted any locally inspectable digest image and that resolver helper functions already expose CUDA and Python marker extraction from docker image inspect data.
phase_notes.build: Added docker_base_image_cuda_python_runtime validation to CUDA training preflight and focused tests for inspectable non-CUDA rejection plus CUDA/Python runtime acceptance.
phase_notes.check: Regenerated current local preflight as NOT_READY_CUDA_LORA_TRAINING with the env var still absent, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke successfully.
phase_notes.done: Phase complete as a runtime-marker preflight hardening gate. It prevents ordinary digest-pinned app images from satisfying the CUDA base-image prerequisite without claiming M6-RC or v0 GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: CUDA training preflight runtime marker validation, focused tests, regenerated preflight/readiness artifacts, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product runtime/API/UI/DB/schema/training behavior changes, no Docker pulls, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.

pabcd.build: Added docker_base_image_cuda_python_runtime validation to CUDA training preflight and focused tests for inspectable non-CUDA rejection plus CUDA/Python runtime acceptance.
pabcd.check: Regenerated current local preflight as NOT_READY_CUDA_LORA_TRAINING with the env var still absent, reran v0 readiness as NOT_GO, and reran m1-smoke successfully.
pabcd.done: Phase complete as a runtime-marker preflight hardening gate. It prevents ordinary digest-pinned app images from satisfying the CUDA base-image prerequisite without claiming M6-RC or v0 GO.
